english_forum.title: New plugin: Callout Control Panel
english_forum.author: jeremiah209
english_forum.content_html:
Callout Control Panel — insert, detect, and manage custom callouts

Hi all! I’ve been building a plugin, testing AI collaboration, to make working with callouts less friction-heavy, and it’s finally ready for wider testing. It has become one of my favorite ways of commenting in my notes and other types of content creation. I’ve been using it for over a week and am happy with how it’s simplified both my desktop and mobile workflows.

I’m still working on the wiki to describe the settings, but it’s pretty self-explanatory. But it’s intended to be super flexible for different use cases.

I’m posting because I’m looking for some feedback and help with stress testing the plugin.

What it does

  • Insert modal — pick a callout type, set collapse state, and insert it at the cursor. Remembers your last used type. (Set to hotkey)
  • Quick-pick — a fast modal to insert from your most-used types. For those who like using the command palette or with a custom command in the mobile toolbar.
  • Custom callout builder — create custom types with a name, icon (Lucide, Font Awesome, or uploaded image), and color. Generates the CSS snippet automatically.
  • CSS detection — scans your enabled snippets and active theme to surface callout types you already have defined, with their icon and color previews.
  • Title overrides — silently replace the default auto-generated title for any callout type in reading view.
  • Import / export — share or back up your custom types as JSON.

Try it

Install via BRAT: https://github.com/jv209/callout-control-panel

Feedback on bugs, UX rough edges, or missing features is very welcome — especially from mobile users.
english_forum.ai_summary: 告别手写标注语法，移动端也能秒插复杂标注块。
english_forum.ai_pain_point: 手写标注语法繁琐易错，特别是移动端输入，调整折叠状态还需手动修改源码。
ai_highlights: 输入标注时免记语法，调出面板直接选定类型并插入光标处。
需要折叠长标注时，插入面板直接设置折叠状态，无需后期修改。
频繁使用同种标注时，自动记忆上次选择，重复操作无需重选。
english_forum.ai_comment: 终于有人拯救在移动端敲方括号的手指了，这种“懒人插件”哪怕是为了不伤关节也值得试。

english_forum.title: New Plugin: Tasks to Telegram
english_forum.author: MBV
english_forum.content_html:
Hi community

I just took a few hours to make a plugin that automatically sends a Telegram message upon completion of certain tasks. It allows me to trigger other parts of my workflow (AI Agent, other automations) and I wanted to post it here, in case it can be of interest for other users.

At current, it only listens to instances of - [ x ] and sends a Telegram message to a chat of your chosing witht the bot of your chosing. You need to enter Bot ID and Chat ID in the Settings.

There are some rules as well to filter which tasks do trigger the message and you can customise the message sent.

It is an initial draft of a small utility and if there is interest, I may expand it a little.

You can test it through BRAT by poinging this repo: GitHub - melbv/obsidian-tasks-to-tg: Obsidian plugin to notify Telegram of the completion of a task
english_forum.ai_summary: 勾选即发Telegram消息，将笔记任务融入外部自动化流。
english_forum.ai_pain_point: 笔记软件与外部工具存在信息孤岛，完成任务后需手动切换APP触发后续流程。
ai_highlights: 勾选任务即触发Telegram，无缝衔接外部AI或自动化脚本。
支持规则过滤特定任务，避免无关紧要的消息轰炸手机。
自定义推送内容，将待办事项转化为结构化自动化指令。
english_forum.ai_comment: 这简直是极客的遥控器，不过摆弄Bot ID可能会劝退一拨怕麻烦的用户。

github_opened.title: Add plugin: Today's Link
github_opened.author: tpremoli
github_opened.body:
# I am submitting a new Community Plugin

- [x] I attest that I have done my best to deliver a high-quality plugin, am proud of the code I have written, and would recommend it to others. I commit to maintaining the plugin and being responsive to bug reports. If I am no longer able to maintain it, I will make reasonable efforts to find a successor maintainer or withdraw the plugin from the directory.

## Repo URL

Link to my plugin: https://github.com/tpremoli/obsidian-todays-link

## Release Checklist
- [x] I have tested the plugin on
  - [x]  Windows
  - [ ]  macOS
  - [x]  Linux
  - [ ]  Android _(if applicable)_
  - [ ]  iOS _(if applicable)_
- [x] My GitHub release contains all required files (as individual files, not just in the source.zip / source.tar.gz)
  - [x] `main.js`
  - [x] `manifest.json`
  - [x] `styles.css` _(optional)_
- [x] GitHub release name matches the exact version number specified in my manifest.json (_**Note:** Use the exact version number, don't include a prefix `v`_)
- [x] The `id` in my `manifest.json` matches the `id` in the `community-plugins.json` file.
- [x] My README.md describes the plugin's purpose and provides clear usage instructions.
- [x] I have read the developer policies at https://docs.obsidian.md/Developer+policies, and have assessed my plugin's adherence to these policies.
- [x] I have read the tips in https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines and have self-reviewed my plugin to avoid these common pitfalls.
- [x] I have added a license in the LICENSE file.
- [x] My project respects and is compatible with the original license of any code from other plugins that I'm using.
      I have given proper attribution to these other projects in my `README.md`.
github_opened.ai_summary: 每日开工一键直达核心笔记，告别大海捞针。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 每天打开 Obsidian 后，总要在文件树里翻半天找今天的日记或工作文档。
ai_highlights: 每天打开库时，无需在文件树翻找，一键直达今日核心笔记。
回顾周报时，能快速定位并引用对应日期的日记或工作链接。
多项目并行时，将当前重点笔记设为今日链接，强制专注。
github_opened.ai_comment: 描述里全是检查清单，也没写这插件到底干嘛，幸好名字还算通俗易懂，不然我还以为是提交了张白纸。

github_opened.title: Added House Fix Manager
github_opened.author: iamrbtm
github_opened.body:
Added a new plugin House Fix Manager.  Manage home renovation tasks with AI-powered analysis, scheduling, and room organization

Please switch to **Preview** and select one of the following links:

* [Community Plugin](?template=plugin.md)
* [Community Theme](?template=theme.md)
github_opened.ai_summary: 专治装修乱象，AI统筹房间修缮进度与计划。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 家庭装修时，任务琐碎、材料繁杂且工期难以统筹管理。
ai_highlights: 装修改造时，AI分析房间现状，自动生成针对性修缮方案。
面对复杂装修工期，AI辅助排期，避免施工进度相互延误。
统筹多房间改造，按空间归类任务，彻底理清装修头绪。
github_opened.ai_comment: 把笔记软件当工地用，这届Obsidian用户真的不拿自己当外人。

github_opened.ai_summary: 告别官方订阅费，利用 R2 存储实现全平台笔记同步。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 不想付费购买官方 Sync，且受困于 iCloud 仅限苹果设备或跨平台同步不稳定的用户。
ai_highlights: 利用 Cloudflare R2 存储，替代昂贵的官方同步服务方案。
解决非苹果设备无法用 iCloud 的痛点，实现全平台互通。
规避 AWS S3 流量费，在多设备频繁同步大文件时节省成本。
github_opened.ai_comment: 终于有人把 Cloudflare R2 这把快刀磨好递给用户了，官方 Sync 的钱包杀手。

将零散任务转化为日历时间块，一眼看清当天笔记里要完成的事
github_opened.ai_comment: Windows和Linux用户只能看着流口水，Mac党终于不用在两个App之间反复横跳了

github_opened.ai_comment: 对于拖延症患者来说，这简直是焦虑发生器，但也最管用。

github_opened.ai_summary: 接入 Copilot，让你的笔记库成为 AI 的上下文大脑。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 面对庞大笔记库时，传统检索无法基于上下文进行深度问答与关联写作。
ai_highlights: 将笔记库作为上下文喂给 Copilot，打破孤岛实现深度问答。
在编辑器内直接调用 Copilot，基于现有笔记辅助写作或写代码。
利用 MCP 协议打通 Copilot 与本地数据，告别剪贴板复制粘贴。
github_opened.ai_comment: Windows 用户先把“真香”打在公屏上，Mac/Linux 的兄弟只能先看着流口水。

github_opened.ai_comment: 终于不用像个无头苍蝇一样切文件夹找终端了，这才是极客该有的样子。

github_opened.ai_summary: 跨平台日记插件，支持移动端，简化每日记录流程。
github_opened.ai_pain_point: 想要培养写日记习惯，但厌恶每天手动新建文件和调整格式。
ai_highlights: 面对每日记录需求，自动创建并打开当日笔记，省去新建文件步骤。
适配安卓与iOS移动端，通勤或睡前场景下随时记录所思所想。
基于日期自动归档管理，回顾往期日记时无需手动分类整理。
github_opened.ai_comment: 第N个日记插件登场，希望它不是来凑数的，至少移动端别崩。

ai.overview: 这一天天的，Obsidian是要逆天！终于打通Mac日历，还能用R2白嫖同步，官方订阅费直接扔一边。写作党狂喜：悬浮速记、情节可视化、手残党免写标注块，爽到飞起。接入Copilot和终端，笔记库瞬间变身最强外挂。别磨蹭，效率党赶紧冲！
